title: Better Journey+
body:
**Immerse urself on a Vanilla+ Experience Journey through this modpack with RPG Elements By yourself or with friends! Explore and find all types of trinkets,structures and more! Progress through the mod by leveling up ur skill points to unlock Stronger Gear and reach into The End.**


**Features Include:**

- New Type Of Progression!

- New Weapons!

- New Biomes!
 
- New Mobs!

- And Much more to Discover!
